feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >Cab driver Stan slams into a homeless man who gets up and walks away, leaving b…
entry.content: >Cab driver Stan slams into a homeless man who gets up and walks away, leaving behind a scarf covered with writhing maggots. Obsessed with the mystery, Stan hunts the figure through the city, discovering a trail of mangled, half-eaten victims, and an urban legend: Puss Head was a sewer worker who came back from an uncharted tunnel changed into something both living and dead. Parents warn their children that the shuffling zombie will get them if they stay out on the streets too late. But as the b

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Gaming is killed
entry.content: Nintendo started killing gaming back in 2017 (and continued it afterwards, with Switch) https://www.pcmag.com/news/pokemon- gold-silver-boxed-copies-dont-conta in-a-cartridge Now dogshit Sony is hammering in the last nail in the coffin Microsoft brought always online DRM and now dogshit Sony is taking that as well Nintendo increased game prices Sony followed Console gaming is DEAD It's run by 3 extra greedy piece of shit corporations

entry.title: /o/ Auto: no AC
entry.content: you guys saved me last time i made a thread (it was the battery) so im gonna ask for help again my AC stopped blowing cold air. When I turn it on the car makes a loud humming noise that matches RPM. Additionally, the engine started making a constant loud fan noise that the car has never made (not 100% sure if these are correlated) i read that the AC clutch can fuck with the serpentine belt, maybe that's why there's extra noise from the engine?? And given the car has 49k i doubt its the compresso

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The Drama
entry.content: Norwegian anon here. Being familiar with Kristoffer’s previous movies, this felt like it was written for Oslo and later changed to Boston with English-speaking actors. Did it give the same impression to Americans, or is life in Boston really like that?

entry.title: /b/ Random: It's quite hilarious the amount of propoganda the shaft inspectors of Trump Amer…
entry.content: It's quite hilarious the amount of propoganda the shaft inspectors of Trump America are spewing over Zohran Mamdani suggesting a 78f (25.5c) thermostat setting instead of a 68f (20c) setting. How insulated with fat must you all be to want 68f when the perfect room temperature for summer shouldn't be freezing compared to outside.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: fenómeno psicológico en el que los juicios o decisiones de un individuo se ven i…
entry.content: fenómeno psicológico en el que los juicios o decisiones de un individuo se ven influenciados por un punto de referencia o "ancla", que puede ser completamente irrelevante. si se les da un ancla general de $20, las personas ajustarán sus decisiones en incrementos grandes ($19, $21, etc.), pero si se les da un ancla más específica como $19.85, las personas ajustarán sus decisiones en una escala menor ($19.75, $19.95, etc.).

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Jim Morrison died on this day 55 years ago
entry.content: >Of all creative bands in the history of rock music, the Doors may have been the most creative. Their first album contains only masterpieces and remains virtually unmatched. Jim Morrison may well be the single most important rock frontman. He is the one who defined the rock vocalist as an artist, not just a singer. Ray Manzarek's style at the keyboards was at the vanguard of the fusion of classical, jazz, soul and rock music. The virulence of some of their riffs bridged the blues-rock era and th

entry.title: /o/ Auto: 2004 WRX just got a solid check engine light? What do? I'm checking things it se…
entry.content: 2004 WRX just got a solid check engine light? What do? I'm checking things it seemingly sounds and drives normal and sounds healthy on start up. Got it in the morning. entry.title: /o/ Auto: Buell Blast
entry.content: For whatever merits they do or don't have (I read mixed opinions between it being a disgrace the name that vibrates harder than a hitachi on idle or just uncomplicated fun hated on for reasons that aren't relevant anymore). Either way, these 500cc taint ticklers are consistently something like $800 less than a Ninja 250 on my local listings. Is worth considering one fresh out of the MSF course for $1200? It feels like consistently the cheapest "smaller" bike near me that isn't some decrepit unre

entry.title: /b/ Random: shooting allegations
entry.content: I got school shooting allegations and idk what will happen. I'm always chillin alone in school and there are a lot of dumbass kids coming up to me talking bs because of it. They ask me like twice a week if I'll shoot up the school and usually I say no but a few days ago I said yes for the first time. It was a joke obviously, they were laughing with me, so they definitely know, I also said jokingly that they're going to be the first ones I'll get. The thing is, right after lunch break they went t

entry.title: /int/ International: This always triggers me, when I see this. Splitting up Ulster like this was a mi…
entry.content: This always triggers me, when I see this. Splitting up Ulster like this was a mistake. And the aesthetic nightmare it created on maps in the end doesn't mean anything in the end, because Catholics have higher birth rates and will eventually vote to join Ireland anyway, unless something unexpected happens with mass migration shenanigans.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What's the use case for the NPU in new mobile processors like the AMD Ryzen™ AI …
entry.content: What's the use case for the NPU in new mobile processors like the AMD Ryzen™ AI 9 HX 470? From what I've read online, these can be used to generate about ~30 tokens per second for a 7b parameter model. What I would like to know if they can be used for generating images too and how good are they at that? if at all. Specs says: >Overall TOPS > Up to 86 TOPS >NPU TOPS > Up to 55 TOPS Anyone has one of these and can enlighten us about the use cases?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Solitude is dangerous. It’s very addictive. It becomes a habit after you realize…
entry.content: Solitude is dangerous. It’s very addictive. It becomes a habit after you realize how peaceful and calm it is. It’s like you don’t want to deal with people anymore because they drain your energy.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: /dag/ - Dhurandhar Appreciation General
entry.content: You've never heard of this before edition. FAQ >wtf is Dhurandhar? It's something like the Citizen Vigilante of India, but actually good. Think Death Wish meets James Bond meets The Godfather, but everyone is brown. It's also extremely offensive to Muslims and racist against every single ethnicity in Pakistan. >What does Dhurandhar mean? It literally means 'Gigachad' in chanspeak, and applies to the protagonist. >Is the protagonist Jewish? No, he's Punjabi Sikh (Aryan). >Does he have his own the

entry.title: /b/ Random: I am a 20-year-old Indigenous from South America. It's been some years now that …
entry.content: I am a 20-year-old Indigenous from South America. It's been some years now that I have been an advocate for my people's rights. Many people here in latinamerica worship white people, for years I have harbored this resentment and hatred toward them, a feeling shared by many of us. I even went as far as to convince some of my peers to think like this. We are second-class citizens in our own countries, we get the worse treatment, our language is dying and no one cares. I realized this a long time a
